POST /agents.desc: Create a blank agent instance and auto-activate it

PUT /agents/{id}.desc: Update an agent's name, description, or agentMd

GET /agents/active.desc: Get active agents — agents currently running as separate bots

GET /agents/event-sources.desc: List available event sources from active workflow emits

POST /agents/{id}/activate.desc: Activate an agent — makes it appear in sidebar as its own bot

POST /agents/{id}/deactivate.desc: Deactivate an agent — removes it from sidebar

POST /agents/{id}/chat.desc: Send a chat message to a specific agent

POST /agents/{id}/workflows.desc: Create a new workflow binding for an agent

PUT /agents/{id}/workflows/{binding_name.desc: Update an existing workflow binding for an agent

PUT /agents/{id}/inputs.desc: Update user-supplied input values for an agent

POST /agents/{id}/check-update.desc: Check if a marketplace agent has an update available

POST /agents/{id}/apply-update.desc: Apply marketplace update to an agent

GET /agents/{id}/stats.desc: Get workflow run stats for an agent

GET /agents/{id}/runs.desc: List workflow runs for an agent

GET /agents/{id}/surfaces.desc: Get active A2UI surface replay messages for an agent

POST /agents/{id}/chats.desc: Create a new chat for an agent

POST /agents/{id}/chats/{chat_id}/activa.desc: Switch to an existing agent chat

POST /chats/companion/new.desc: Create a new companion chat session

GET /chats/{chat_id}/tool-output/{tool_c.desc: Get tool output lazily by tool_call_id

POST /chats/messages/{id}/edit.desc: Edit a chat message and truncate everything after it

POST /files/pick-folder.desc: Pick a folder via native dialog

POST /integrations/{id}/connect.desc: Connect MCP integration — establish connection and register tools

POST /integrations/{id}/reauthenticate.desc: Reauthenticate MCP integration — clear credentials and restart OAuth flow

POST /neboloop/janus/usage/refresh.desc: Force-refresh Janus usage from Janus gateway

POST /neboloop/billing/checkout.desc: Create Stripe checkout session (hosted or embedded)

POST /neboloop/billing/setup-intent.desc: Create Stripe SetupIntent for in-app payment method collection

GET /neboloop/referral-code.desc: Get or create the user's referral/invite code

GET /skills/{name}/secrets.desc: List skill secrets and their configuration status
